TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Carl Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1913 , ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 11, Carl Anderson, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2001) qnxan nya Carl Anderson htagan beh sa Lynchburg,Virginia.hiya yaya yaba ga James ru Alberta Anderson. mqwas biru ga,Anderson sangka' mlaka' te babaw kayal skoki mhetay. 1965 kawas tmasoq pqwasan biru maki Lynchburg. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨarl an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ʦ~ʨarl an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja ʦ~ʨarl an*ers~ɕon ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ljnʦ~ʨħβurɣ,*irɣinia.ħija jaja jaβa ɣa *ames~ɕ ru alβerta an*ers~ɕon. mqwas~ɕ βiru ɣa,an*ers~ɕon s~ɕaŋkaʔ mlakaʔ te βaβaw kajal s~ɕkoki mħetaj. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq pqwas~ɕan βiru maki ljnʦ~ʨħβurɣ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Carl Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1913 , ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 11, Carl Anderson, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2001) qnxan nya Carl Anderson htagan beh sa Lynchburg,Virginia.hiya yaya yaba ga James ru Alberta Anderson. mqwas biru ga,Anderson sangka' mlaka' te babaw kayal skoki mhetay. 1965 kawas tmasoq pqwasan biru maki Lynchburg. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨarl an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ʦ~ʨarl an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja ʦ~ʨarl an*ers~ɕon ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ljnʦ~ʨħβurɣ,*irɣinia.ħija jaja jaβa ɣa *ames~ɕ ru alβerta an*ers~ɕon. mqwas~ɕ βiru ɣa,an*ers~ɕon s~ɕaŋkaʔ mlakaʔ te βaβaw kajal s~ɕkoki mħetaj. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq pqwas~ɕan βiru maki ljnʦ~ʨħβurɣ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
